item.description:
• Improvements
    • Results charts and breakdowns appear only after the selected drive has been scanned
    • System Status shows the Good/Fair/Poor rating scale with the active label highlighted
    • Health score card includes the weighted formula and step-by-step calculation for the current score

• Improvements
    • Storage results, category file lists, and top consumers now filter to the selected sidebar drive only
    • Switching drives reloads that volume's indexed results automatically after startup
    • System-volume scans skip mounted external volumes so they are indexed on their own drive
    • Health score card explains Fair/Good/Poor ratings with CPU, memory, and disk breakdowns plus suggestions
    • Top CPU and Top Memory only show significant usage; process detail sheets add role explanations
  • Fixes
    • Internal SSD scan results no longer mix in files from external volumes such as Media or External Storage

• What's new
    • System Status tab in the toolbar with health score, metrics, and top CPU / top memory process lists
    • Process detail sheet with owner, bundle ID, executable path, and quit or force quit actions
  • Improvements
    • System health monitoring uses a shared service for the menu bar badge and System Status tab
